name: Dscam1_hypervariable_chr2R
description: Dscam1 (Down syndrome cell adhesion molecule 1) on chr2R — encodes >38,000 protein isoforms by mutually exclusive alternative splicing of 95 variable exons (12 exon-4s, 48 exon-6s, 33 exon-9s, 2 exon-17s). Variable exons are 80-95% identical to each other — locally a paralog cluster within a single gene. Critical for neuron self-recognition and immune diversity (functional analogue of vertebrate Ig repertoire).
expected_copy_count: 1 gene locus, 95 alternative cassette exons within
